prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the regulatory judgment of Torus62 Limited, a registered provider of social housing primarily operating in England, specifically Liverpool, St Helens, and Warrington. As such, it does not apply to Scotland or discuss any specific Scottish housing regulations or landlords.
